description_long: This bollard is constructed from a coarse, speckled stone material, giving it a robust and weathered appearance suitable for urban environments. The main body is a thick, cylindrical column that rises vertically from a wide, rounded base, which is itself set atop a square stone platform. Four spherical stone elements are positioned at each corner of the base, adding both decorative and functional value by increasing visibility and deterring vehicle passage. The surface texture is rough and unpolished, with visible grain and color variation typical of granite or similar stone. The cap of the bollard is gently rounded, blending seamlessly with the cylindrical shaft. There are no visible reflective markings, chains, or connectors, and the entire structure appears solid and immovable.
description: A heavy, cylindrical stone bollard with a rounded cap, set on a square base with four stone spheres at the corners. The surface is rough and speckled, giving it a durable, weathered look.
description_view_0: The cylindrical shaft and rounded cap are prominent, with three of the four corner spheres clearly visible on the square base.
description_view_1: The bollard is seen from a rotated angle, highlighting the thickness of the column and the arrangement of the spheres on the base.
description_view_2: This view emphasizes the rounded base and the alignment of the spheres, with the cylindrical shaft rising centrally.
description_view_3: The square base and three of the four spheres are visible, with the rough stone texture of the shaft and base clearly shown.
